name: linkraft
description: Open-source MCP toolkit for Claude Code. Curated, tested integrations for Telegram, Discord, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Gmail, Notion, Slack, Google Calendar, Google Sheets.

plugins.name: linkraft-telegram
plugins.description: Telegram Bot API: send messages, manage groups, inline keyboards, webhooks. 18 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-discord
plugins.description: Discord Bot API: messages, channels, guilds, member management. 22 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-twitter-x
plugins.description: Twitter/X API v2: tweets, users, likes, retweets, bookmarks. 17 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-linkedin
plugins.description: LinkedIn API: posts, profiles, organizations. 9 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-instagram
plugins.description: Instagram Graph API: media, comments, insights. 10 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-gmail
plugins.description: Gmail API: send, read, label, and manage email threads. 11 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-notion
plugins.description: Notion API: pages, databases, blocks. 10 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-slack
plugins.description: Slack API: messages, channels, reactions, pins. 14 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-google-calendar
plugins.description: Google Calendar API: events, calendars, quick add. 9 tools.

plugins.name: linkraft-google-sheets
plugins.description: Google Sheets API: read, write, append, and manage spreadsheets. 8 tools.
